name: gemini-cli
description: Google's Gemini AI in the terminal — prompt, chat, and generate content from the command line.

commands.name: prompt
commands.description: Send a one-off prompt to Gemini

commands.name: generate
commands.syntax: gemini generate --type code 'build a REST API'

use_cases: Generate code or text as part of an automated pipeline
Use as a sub-agent for complex reasoning tasks
agent_metadata.example_workflow: cat README.md | gemini 'Summarize this project in 3 bullet points'
